description: BorePosition optimization on Didgeridoo-2stage (3D BOBYQA). Tests bore position optimization with bottomPointUnchanged=false (standalone). First dimension is absolute bottom position (DIMENSIONAL), remaining are fractional positions (DIMENSIONLESS).
notes: Didgeridoo-2stage has 5 bore points, 0 holes, lip reed. getTopOfBody() returns 1 → n_unchanged = 2, n_dims = 5-2-0 = 3 (bottomPointUnchanged=false). Oracle constraints: [0.508,2.54] (DIMENSIONAL bottom pos), [0.01,0.99] (DIMENSIONLESS frac), [0.0,0.001] (DIMENSIONLESS frac). No BoreLengthAdjust needed (holes=0).
